title: Manage mailchimp campaign with Monday
excerpt:

posts.author: Lucyr (Lucy)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello, I am new to Monday.com, I have created the integration between MailChimp and Monday.com.
The problem that I have is when I send a new newsletter using Mailchimp I need to see the status of the campaign on my board, so I need to see from my contacts who opened or did not open the email. Currently, I am using CRM and I have created my contact list.

I have read that I can set multiple automation, to continuously track different stages of the campaign, but I don’t know how to do it and I am not sure if this will help.

I would appreciate any ideas or recommendations on how I can achieve this.

Thanks in advance for your help.

posts.author: Fantasy-Media-Team (Fantasy Media Team)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @Lucyr

We developed an app called Mailchimp Integration Plus that provides a robust integration with Mailchimp. Amongst other capabilities, it allows to do full mapping of campaign fields from Mailchimp to monday so you could track its status. Here’s an example →

Screenshot 2024-05-13 at 13.34.352176×380 34.8 KB

You can find it in the monday.com marketplace in the platform or here - monday.com: Apps Marketplace

Hope that helps!
